Project stack: Nx monorepo, pnpm, Angular 21, NestJS, NgRx, PostgreSQL, Tailwind CSS.

Rules:
- Always use TypeScript.
- Prefer standalone Angular components.
- Prefer Angular Signals wherever possible.
- Use NgRx only for app-level shared state.
- Keep components small, dumb, and reusable.
- Move business logic to services, facades, or stores.
- Use Tailwind utility classes instead of custom CSS when possible.
- Write clean, strongly typed code and avoid any.
- Follow Nx structure and keep libraries modular and focused.
- In NestJS, use controllers for transport, services for business logic, and repositories for data access.
- Use PostgreSQL-friendly patterns and clear database schemas.
- Prefer simple, readable solutions over overengineering.
- Write all code, comments, commit messages, and documentation in English.
- Generate production-ready code, not demos or placeholders.
